answer:
The first inversion of a major-minor seventh chord has the third in the bass.  
Option A shows [F, B, D, G] which is a half-diminished seventh in first inversion, not major-minor.  
Option B shows [A, E♭, F, C] which is a dominant seventh chord (G7) in first inversion, correct.  
Thus, the correct answer is \boxed{B}.
